Testimonials

Hear from the families who found their perfect Cavalier King Charles Spaniel companion with us.

What Our Families Say

Read reviews from happy families with their Cavalier puppies

SM

Sarah M.

Verified

5/5

Biscuit stole our hearts from the very first moment. He arrived healthy, sociable, and with a gorgeous coat. The team at Harris Heritage Cavaliers guided us through everything.

2 weeks ago - Nashville, TN

Harris Heritage Cavaliers

Verified

5/5

Daisy adapted perfectly from the first day. The process with Harris Heritage Cavaliers was transparent and professional from start to finish.

1 month ago - Charlotte, NC

Verified

5/5

Cooper is pure love. The veterinary documentation was complete and the after-sale follow-up has been excellent. Highly recommended.

3 weeks ago - Austin, TX

Verified

5/5

Luna has become the queen of the house. Harris Heritage Cavaliers made the entire process so easy and gave us really useful tips.

5/5

Winston has incredible energy. You can tell Harris Heritage Cavaliers raises their puppies with so much love. Best decision I've ever made.

2 weeks ago - Portland, OR

Harris Heritage Cavaliers
Harris Heritage Cavaliers

Premium Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies raised with love in a family home in the USA. Harris Heritage Cavaliers is dedicated to breeding healthy, happy puppies that fill every home with warmth and joy.
